2606.13348.title: IVIE: A Neuro-symbolic Approach to Incremental and Validated Generation of Interactive Fiction Worlds
2606.13348.paper_summary: Computational creativity in Interactive Fiction faces a fundamental tension: Large Language Models (LLM) may produce creative narratives but struggle with world coherence, while symbolic systems ensure consistency but lack creative flexibility. We present IVIE (Incremental & Validated Interactive Experiences), a neuro-symbolic approach to generating complete and playable interactive fiction worlds from scratch. Building upon PAYADOR's neuro-symbolic framework, IVIE implements a four-stage incremental generation pipeline that delegates creative decisions--setting and character creation, puzzle design--to LLMs while grounding the world state through symbolic validation. The system generates worlds with interconnected locations, functional items, non-player characters, and coherent puzzles, all structured around a central goal-oriented architecture. Human evaluation shows the approach generates immersive, thematically coherent worlds with high player engagement. Results seem to indicate that the neuro-symbolic approach successfully balances flexibility with narrative coherence: symbolic validation grounds LLM generation without eliminating generative freedom. However, challenges remain: LLM inconsistencies occasionally bypass puzzle constraints, and objective validation gaps allow some structurally impossible goals. We identify key design considerations for future neurosymbolic interactive storytelling systems, particularly regarding LLM capabilities and their limitations.
2606.13348.paper_summary_zh: 計算創造力在互動小說中面臨根本的緊張關係：大型語言模型（LLM）可能產生創意敘事，但在世界一致性方面卻掙扎，而符號系統則確保一致性但缺乏創造性靈活性。我們提出了 IVIE（增量與驗證的互動體驗），這是一種神經符號方法，旨在從零開始生成完整且可玩的互動小說世界。在 PAYADOR 的神經符號框架基礎上，IVIE 實現了一個四階段的增量生成管道，將創意決策——場景和角色創建、謎題設計——委派給 LLM，同時通過符號驗證來確立世界狀態。該系統生成具有互聯位置、功能性物品、非玩家角色和一致謎題的世界，所有這些都圍繞一個以目標為導向的架構進行組織。人類評估顯示，該方法生成了沉浸式、主題一致的世界，並且玩家參與度高。結果似乎表明，神經符號方法成功地在靈活性與敘事一致性之間取得平衡：符號驗證在不消除生成自由的情況下為 LLM 生成提供了基礎。然而，挑戰仍然存在：LLM 不一致的情況偶爾會繞過謎題約束，而客觀驗證的缺口則允許一些結構上不可能的目標。我們確定了未來神經符號互動敘事系統的關鍵設計考量，特別是關於 LLM 的能力及其限制。
2606.13348.author: Micaela Vaucher et.al.
2606.13348.authors: Micaela Vaucher, Santiago Silveira, Santiago Góngora, Luis Chiruzzo
